tluaLocalUnused.tlua(2,7): error TS6133: 'unusedLua' is declared but its value is never read.


==== tluaLocalUnused.tlua (2 errors) ====
    local scriptLet = 1;
          ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS6133: 'scriptLet' is declared but its value is never read.
    local unusedLua = 1;
          ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS6133: 'unusedLua' is declared but its value is never read.
    local usedLua = 1;
    usedLua;
